title: alyssum rostratum
intro: Alyssum rostratum, also known as Sweet Alyssum or White Rose of Winter, is a low-growing, evergreen perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Alyssum rostratum include its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system, improve sleep quality, and act as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, Alyssum rostratum is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
